title: Bulk Import Files & Dedicated "Picture" Column

posts.author: Remi (Remi Padritge)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday.com team,

I’d like to request two features that would greatly enhance the platform’s usability for handling images and files:

  1. Bulk Importing Files: It would be incredibly helpful to allow users to bulk import files or images directly from a Google Sheet or Excel file into Monday.com. Currently, when attempting to map a “Product Photo” column from Google Sheets to the “File” column in Monday.com, an error appears indicating that the File column isn’t supported for imports. This feature would streamline workflows that involve uploading multiple files at once.

  2. Dedicated “Picture” Column: Additionally, a dedicated “Picture” column would be a fantastic addition, allowing users to directly add images (not just links) into Monday.com. This would be valuable for visually tracking products, designs, or any other image-based content without relying on external links.

Thank you for considering these updates; they would be invaluable for those of us working with visual content in Monday.com!
